scripts.build: ng build cairn-app && npm run check:bundle
scripts.build:libs: ng build @cairn/api && ng build @cairn/components && ng build @cairn/domain
scripts.build:all: npm run build:libs && npm run build
scripts.test: npm run typecheck && npm run test:app && npm run test:api && npm run test:components && npm run test:domain && npm run test:contract
scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit -p projects/cairn/api/tsconfig.spec.json && tsc --noEmit -p projects/cairn/components/tsconfig.spec.json && tsc --noEmit -p projects/cairn/domain/tsconfig.spec.json && tsc --noEmit -p projects/cairn-app/tsconfig.spec.json
